heroHeadline: USS George H.W. Bush Arrives Near Iran (3rd Carrier); Araghchi in Islamabad for Indirect Talks — Day 56
heroSubtitle: A third US carrier strike group deployed to waters near Iran on April 24 as the Pentagon seized a second Iranian oil tanker and Iranian FM Araghchi traveled to Islamabad for Pakistan-mediated indirect talks. The Senate defeated a 5th Iran war powers resolution 46–51 on April 23 as Iran began collecting Strait of Hormuz transit tolls at up to $20M/day. Senate passed a $70B ICE reconciliation resolution at 3:30 a.m. DOJ reclassified medical marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III in the most significant federal drug policy shift in 56 years.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all US-based Watchboard trackers.
